title: Add a Real-Time Clock Widget
description: Create a widget displaying current date, time, and timezone.
solution: Create a div updated every second via setInterval. Display formatted date and time.

title: Build a Data Table with Sorting
description: Add click-to-sort functionality on table columns.
requirements: Works with text and numeric values
solution: On th click, sort the tr array by the column's data type. Re-render tbody. Toggle sort direction.

title: Create a Dashboard Theme Customizer
description: Build a panel to customize dashboard colors (primary, sidebar, background) live.
requirements: Color pickers for primary, sidebar, background
solution: Add a settings panel with color inputs. Each input updates the corresponding CSS custom property. Store all values in localStorage.
